RailPillarMaxHeight.description: Maximum height of elevated train-track pillars, in tiles (vanilla: 6). Also raises the rail build cursor cap. Do not lower this below the height of rail pillars already built or they may collapse.

RailPillarSupportDistance.description: Maximum distance, in tiles, that elevated track may be from a supporting pillar (vanilla: 7). Auto-built rail pillars end up roughly twice this far apart. Do not lower this below what existing tracks use or they may collapse.

TransportPillarMaxHeight.description: Maximum height of elevated pipe/belt pillars, in tiles (vanilla: 6). Also raises the pipe/belt build cursor cap. Do not lower this below the height of transport pillars already built or they may collapse.

TransportPillarSupportDistance.description: Maximum distance, in tiles, that an elevated pipe or belt may be from a supporting pillar (vanilla: 4). Auto-built transport pillars end up roughly twice this far apart. Do not lower this below what existing pipes/belts use or they may collapse.
